exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your boat maintenance forward
items: Inspect and test all safety equipment including life jackets, flares, fire extinguishers, and emergency signaling devices
Change engine oil and filter, then check all fluid levels including transmission, power steering, and coolant
Clean and waterproof all electrical connections, then test navigation lights, bilge pumps, and instrument panel functionality
Inspect hull and deck for cracks, scratches, or gel coat damage that occurred during winter storage
Test and calibrate all navigation instruments including GPS, depth finder, compass, and radio communication systems
Inspect and replace fuel filters, then test fuel lines and connections for leaks or deterioration

items.title: The Complete Guide to Winterizing Your Boat Engine
Keeping Your Hull Beautiful: The Complete Guide to Gelcoat Care and Restoration
Protecting Your Marine Electronics: A Complete Guide to Saltwater Survival
